message:
feat(analytics): wire cost timeseries from Track B + cost estimation fields (z9fse.10, z9fse.3.7)

Add query_cost_timeseries() reading token_daily_stats (Track B) which
carries estimated_cost_usd. Switch run_analytics_cost from Track A
(usage_daily, always 0.0 cost) to Track B so cost buckets reflect
actual model-pricing data. Add safe_div_f64 helper, cost derived
metrics (cost_per_message, cost_per_1k_api_tokens), pricing_coverage_pct,
EstimatedCostUsd metric variant, and comprehensive tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
